zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Mainwaring於1499年出生在英國爾時，她的父親Roger Mainwaring40歲，母親Margaret Brooke30歲。她和Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1561年9月10日在英國英格蘭爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Mainwaring于1499年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲Roger Mainwaring40岁，母亲Margaret Brooke30岁。她和Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich至少有6个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1561年9月10日在英国英格兰爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Mainwaring was born in 1499, in Cheshire, England, her father, Roger Mainwaring, was 40 and her mother, Margaret Brooke, was 30. She had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich. She died on 10 September 1561, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Mainwaring est née en 1499, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Mainwaring, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Brooke, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1561, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Mainwaring 1499 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Mainwaring 40 und ihre Mutter Margaret Brooke 30. Sie hatte mit Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. September 1561 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Mainwaring è nata il nel 1499 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, Roger Mainwaring, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Margaret Brooke, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich. Morì il 10 settembre 1561, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Mainwaringが1499年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger Mainwaringは40歳，母Margaret Brookeは30歳であった。彼女はThomas Maisterson of Nantwichとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1561年9月10日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Mainwaring(이)가 1499년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Mainwaring(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Brooke(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1561년 9월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Mainwaring nasceu em 1499, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Mainwaring, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Brooke, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich. Ela faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1561, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Mainwaring родилась в 1499 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Mainwaring было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Brooke, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich. Она умерла 10 сентября 1561 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Mainwaring nació en 1499, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Mainwaring, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Brooke, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con Thomas Maisterson of Nantwich. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1561, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
